entity.summary: Cross-chain decentralized liquidity protocol and exchange network launched as multichain Chaosnet on 2021-04-13. THORChain remained active after two Ethereum-router exploits in July 2021, when trading was halted, liquidity providers were promised reimbursement, and the protocol introduced additional security controls before returning to operation.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record for the THORChain network rather than individual frontends or chain integrations.

events.title: THORChain multichain Chaosnet launched
events.description: THORChain launched multichain Chaosnet on 2021-04-13 with a capped RUNE allocation, enabling native cross-chain liquidity and swaps across supported assets without wrapping them into one chain.
events.notes: Official development update provides the exact launch date.

events.title: Ethereum router exploits halted THORChain trading
events.description: THORChain suffered two Ethereum-router exploits in July 2021. The incidents drained assets from the protocol, prompted trading halts and reimbursement commitments, and led to a security-hardening program before the network was progressively restored.
events.notes: The representative date is the first widely reported July exploit. The event description covers the linked July 2021 exploit sequence documented in THORChain's own postmortem.

evidence.title: Weekly Dev Update #89
evidence.notes: Primary project update stating that multichain Chaosnet launched on 2021-04-13.

evidence.title: THORChain official website
evidence.notes: Current official project site confirming continued operation of the THORChain network.

evidence.title: Weekly Dev Update #98
evidence.notes: Primary project update discussing the ERC777 router reentrancy incident, fixes and restoration commitments.

evidence.title: Post-mortem: ETH Router Exploits 1 & 2, and premature Return To Trading Incident
evidence.notes: Primary postmortem covering both July 2021 Ethereum-router exploits, the premature return-to-trading incident and the remediation plan.

evidence.title: THORChain archived homepage index
evidence.notes: Archive index retained for historical website continuity.
